examples.title: GAN Training Loop
examples.code:
FOR epoch in epochs:
  FOR batch in data:
    # Train Discriminator
    real_loss = BCE(D(x_real), 1)
    fake = G(z)
    fake_loss = BCE(D(fake.detach()), 0)
    D_loss = (real_loss + fake_loss)/2
    update(D)
    
    # Train Generator
    G_loss = BCE(D(fake), 1)
    update(G)
examples.explanation: Alternating updates for discriminator and generator
